message:
🐛 Fix leaderboard rate limiting: bulk fetch via REST API (#1301)

The previous approach made 2 Search API calls per contributor (issues +
PRs), hitting the 30 req/min rate limit after ~12 contributors. This
caused remaining contributors to silently get 0 points.

New approach: fetch ALL issues+PRs per repo in bulk using the REST API
(/repos/{repo}/issues?state=all), then group by author and score
locally. The REST API has a 5,000 req/hr limit vs Search API's 30
req/min, eliminating rate limit failures entirely.

Also excludes bot accounts (web-flow, dependabot, github-actions) from
the leaderboard.

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
